action.reasoning: Observation: Custom SchNet achieved test MAE=0.0607, within SOTA range. Model was still improving at epoch 50. Analysis: Continued training with fresh LR schedule should push MAE lower. Also, adding EMA (exponential moving average) and LayerNorm could improve generalization. Decision: Modify train.py to resume from best checkpoint, train 100 more epochs with EMA and fresh cosine LR. Submit eval after training completes.
